zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence Prouse於1480年出生在英國戴文哈福德時，他的父親John Prouse Lord of Bredy24歲，母親Joan Orchard22歲。他於1500年與Agnes Cole在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1526年9月24日在他的家鄉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lawrence Prouse于1480年出生在英国戴文哈福德时，他的父亲John Prouse Lord of Bredy24岁，母亲Joan Orchard22岁。他于1500年与Agnes Cole在英国英格兰戴文哈福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1526年9月24日在他的家乡享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Preuss  .
Americanized form of German Brause 2, a nickname for a violent, stormy person, from Middle High German brūs ‘noise, storm’.

variants.name: Prowse
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): nickname from Middle English prous, prus, variant forms of prou ‘brave, valiant, proud’ (see Prue ).
English (Devon and Cornwall): ethnic name: from Middle English Prus(se), Pruce ‘Prussia, Prussian’, for someone from that region. Compare Sprouse .
Americanized form of German   Prause   or   Praus  , or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence Prouse was born in 1480, in Chagford, Devon, England, his father, John Prouse Lord of Bredy, was 24 and his mother, Joan Orchard, was 22. He married Agnes Cole in 1500, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 September 1526, in his hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence Prouse est né en 1480, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Prouse Lord of Bredy, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Orchard, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Cole en 1500, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1526, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lawrence Prouse 1480 in Chagford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Prouse Lord of Bredy 24 und seine Mutter Joan Orchard 22. Er hat 1500 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom Agnes Cole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. September 1526 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence Prouse è nato il nel 1480 nel Chagford, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Prouse Lord of Bredy, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan Orchard, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Cole nel 1500, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1526, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence Prouseが1480年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父John Prouse Lord of Bredyは24歳，母Joan Orchardは22歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードでAgnes Coleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1526年9月24日に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Prouse(이)가 1480년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Prouse Lord of Bredy(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Orchard(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 Agnes Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1526년 9월 24일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence Prouse nasceu em 1480, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Prouse Lord of Bredy, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Orchard, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Cole em 1500, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1526, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lawrence Prouse родился в 1480 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Prouse Lord of Bredy было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Orchard, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Cole в 1500 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 сентября 1526 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lawrence Prouse nació en 1480, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Prouse Lord of Bredy, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Orchard, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Agnes Cole en 1500, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1526, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años.
